title.en: Medical device software - Software life cycle processes
title.zh: 医疗器械软件 - 软件生命周期过程

standards.abstract: Defines the lifecycle requirements for medical device software development and maintenance. Harmonized under EU MDR. Critical for all digital health and wearable medical devices with software.
standards.scope: Software lifecycle processes for medical device software (applies to SaMD, SiMD, wearable apps).
standards.note: Mandatory for wearable medical devices with embedded or companion software.

title.en: Health informatics - Device interoperability - Part 10101: Nomenclature
title.zh: 健康信息学 - 设备互操作性 - 第10101部分：命名法

standards.abstract: Provides nomenclature for communication between personal health devices and managers. Essential for wearable medical devices that transmit physiological data.
standards.scope: Nomenclature for personal health device communication (wearables, home monitors).

title.en: Health informatics - Device interoperability - Part 10417: Personal health device communication - Device specialization - Glucose meter
title.zh: 健康信息学 - 设备互操作性 - 第10417部分：个人健康设备通信 - 设备专化 - 血糖仪

standards.abstract: Establishes a normative definition of communication between personal glucose meter devices and compute engines. Edition 3. Published 2024.
standards.scope: Communication protocol for connected glucose meters (CGM wearable devices).

title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 1-11: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance - Collateral standard: Requirements for medical electrical equipment and medical electrical systems used in the home healthcare environment
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第1-11部分：基本安全和基本性能的通用要求 - 并列标准：家庭保健环境中使用的医用电气设备和医用电气系统的要求

standards.abstract: Requirements for medical equipment used in home healthcare (wearables, home monitors, telehealth). Covers non-professional user environment considerations. EN IEC 60601-1-11:2015/A1:2020 harmonized under EU MDR.
standards.scope: Medical electrical equipment for home healthcare environment (wearables, remote monitoring).

title.en: Health software - Part 2: Health and wellness apps - Quality and reliability
title.zh: 健康软件 - 第2部分：健康和保健应用程序 - 质量和可靠性

standards.abstract: Defines quality and reliability requirements for health and wellness apps. Applicable to mobile health apps and wearable companion software. Provides an app quality assessment framework.
standards.scope: Quality framework for health and wellness mobile apps (mHealth).
